channel.title: Articles on Analyst
channel.description: Recent content in Articles on Analyst

item.title: Impacket
item.description: Install pip install pcapy pip install impacket Usage ❌ Error: ip.get_th_sport doesn’t display ports

item.title: Scapy
item.description: Install Download MacTex here and install. Install SoX. Then, the following [steps](pip install –pre scapy[complete]) are tested on MacOSX:

item.title: Dshell
item.description: Installing Install with Python3. sudo python3 -m pip install [tar_file] # option 1 pip install dshell # option 2.

item.title: Btfm
item.description: Dshell # MacOSX path to directory with pyenv (example): /Users/[user_name]/.pyenv/versions/3.8.5/envs/python3/lib/python3.8/site-packages/dshell/ decode -l # list decoders decode -d [decoder_name] # decoder info # who talked to whom decode -d ip [capture_file_name].

item.title: Forensic Lab Setup
item.description: In this article I will walk you through the process of setting up the lab for pentesting iOS applications.

item.title: Idevice as Forensic Tool
item.description: Lorem markdownum aequalis strigis. Saetigeri iubeas, vultu huic alvum nondum de obside ut laniavit arbor palmis, cum quin.

item.title: Btfm
item.description: Rabin2 rabin2 -I [progname] # main info about the prog rabin2 -z [progname] # the strings from the binary's data section rabin2 -zz [progname] # all strings from the binary rabin2 -zqq [progname] # strings only without additional info R2 r2 [progname] # launch radare2 > s main # seak main function and go to it > aa # find all strings > v # psedu GUI mode (Hex editor) > VV # graph mode > afvn user_input input # rename local var and all the places it was referenced # rename function > s function_old_name > afn function_new_name > c # show cursor in visual mode Graph mode VV # open Graph # go to a function via shortcut (;[ao]) o # first type 'o' key > a # then enter the second letter from the brakets Test this https://r2wiki.

item.title: On-Device Ios Toolkit
item.description: Tools For each tool in the list there will be a corresponding page with installation guides or usage if I’ve encountered some problems.

item.title: BTFM iOS
item.description: Device Info Get UDID in different ways (using MacOS): ioreg -p IOUSB -l | grep "USB Serial" idevice_id -l # get UDID with ideviceinstaller system_profiler SPUSBDataType | sed -n -e '/iPad/,/Serial/p;/iPhone/,/Serial/p;/iPod/,/Serial/p' | grep "Serial Number:" # instruments -s devices Get BootROM version (old or new).

item.title: BTFM Android
item.description: ADB On mobile enable developer’s mode and USB debugging. Trust the PC with adb when prompted on mobile.

item.title: RTFM Android
item.description: Prerequisites Get package name: # on Android ./frida-server-XX # on PC, option 1 frida-ps -U | grep [partial_name] # on PC, option 2 drozer console connect run app.

item.title: RTFM iOS
item.description: Application OSINT Table: Information ANSWER iDevice UDID Package name App’s folder with bin (UUID) App’s folder with data (UUID) Paths # get App's folder with data (UUID) and App's folder with bin (UUID).
# oh my zsh bash themes sh -c "$(curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ohmyzsh/ohmyzsh/master/tools/install.sh)" # sh -c "$(fetch -o - https://raw.
